extraction.one_line_summary: BERNAL Egan attacked solo halfway up Passo Giau (10km at 10%), descended alone, and won by 27 seconds to consolidate the Maglia Rosa
tactical_patterns: EF Education Nippo paced entire approach to set up Carthy's GC move, controlling tempo before final climb despite no stage win.
Bernal's solo attack at 5km to summit on Passo Giau immediately isolated all GC rivals without team support needed.
Caruso rode conservatively into podium position while Yates imploded, gaining second at 2:24 without attacking.

rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: positive: solo attack mid-climb on 10% gradient confirms descending ability and willingness to race without teammates in adverse conditions
rider_signals.CARTHY Hugh: neutral: team's massive pacing effort delivered him to podium position but couldn't follow when Bernal accelerated
rider_signals.YATES Simon: negative: dropped from second to fifth losing 2:36, catastrophic collapse when race went hard on steep climbing
rider_signals.CARUSO Damiano: positive: rode into second overall at 2:24 without attacking, showing superior consistency over explosive rivals in weather-shortened stage
rider_signals.VLASOV Aleksandr: negative: mechanical on final climb destroyed rhythm, lost podium position despite previously strong GC stance
rider_signals.ZAKARIN Ilnur: negative: crash before final climb attempting to position for breakaway, tactical error chasing across gaps in deteriorating conditions
